summary: Ship. R-1 is resolved: the RED tail contains the exact symptom token with exit 1, GREEN shows harness success with exit 0, both characterization runs remain green, ancestry/tree SHAs match, and the harness blob is unchanged. The wrapper only re-emits harness-produced FAIL lines and exits the saved harness status, so it preserves machine-owned flip semantics.
next_steps: Record the round-2 approval and proceed with normal landing and post-sync verification.
